name: Doomed from the Start: Early Abort of LLM Agent Episodes via a Recall-Controlled Probe Cascade
summary: arXiv:2607.06503v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents often waste inference compute by continuing multi-step trajectories that are already doomed to fail. We study e...
description: arXiv:2607.06503v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents often waste inference compute by continuing multi-step trajectories that are already doomed to fail. We study early failure prediction and inference-time early stopping for LLM agents using hidden-state probes. Lightweight linear probes on internal activations predict eventual task failure from the first inter...
author: Kai Ruan, Zihe Huang, Ziqi Zhou, Qianshan Wei, Jinghao Lin, Xuan Wang, Hao Sun
